message:
refactor(runtime): restructure shadow run comparator with typed mismatch codes, scenario specs, and JSON evidence reports

Major overhaul of the shadow-run comparator test infrastructure to
produce structured, machine-readable evidence reports suitable for
automated triage and artifact collection.

MismatchReasonCode enum (7 variants):
- Trace, Log, RunningState, TickRate, CommandLogLength, FrameHash,
  FrameCount — each with code() (e.g., "TRACE_DIVERGENCE"),
  root_cause_class() ("semantic"/"observability"/"policy"), and
  failure_class() (maps to FailureClass from ftui-harness)

MismatchEvidence — now Serialize with enriched fields:
- reason_code, failure_class, root_cause_class (from MismatchReasonCode)
- summary field for one-line human-readable description
- Display impl includes [CODE:CLASS] prefix for log scanning

ScenarioSpec — static scenario definition:
- name, scenario_kind ("equivalence"/"identity"/"stress"/"regression"),
  contract_focus (what property is under test),
  assertion (AssertionCategory from validation_matrix),
  messages factory fn, frames configuration

ScenarioReport — per-scenario JSON evidence:
- schema_version "1", verdict ("match"/"divergence"),
  contract_status ("upheld"/"violated"),
  acceptable_difference_policy reference,
  replay_command shell string, baseline/candidate LaneSummary,
  mismatch_count, full mismatches array

SuiteSummary — aggregate summary:
- total/matched/diverged scenarios, total_mismatches,
  scenario_filter (from SCENARIO env var)

run_scenario() refactored:
- Accepts ScenarioSpec, returns ScenarioReport
- Comparison logic extracted into compare_results() returning
  Vec<MismatchEvidence> with typed reason codes
- SHADOW_RUN_REPORT_DIR env var: when set, each scenario writes
  {name}.json report + full suite_summary.json at the end
- Existing panic-on-mismatch behavior preserved for cargo test

All existing scenarios migrated to ScenarioSpec format with explicit
scenario_kind, contract_focus, and assertion annotations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
